treatment_information.dosage_or_details: acrylic glue used to embolize two different branches of the right postero-lateral choroidal artery
treatment_information.treatment_response: improved circulation pattern of the brain
cure of her vein of Galen malformation

treatment_timeline.event: echocardiogram revealing a persistent foramen ovale but no cardiac insufficiency and two suspected left partial epileptic seizures
developmental delay noted with lack of eye contact, no smiles, and feeding difficulties
opisthotonus-like attacks with an increasing frequency and head extended when placed in bed
admission to the neuropaediatric department, radiological evaluation with transfontanellar ultrasound and MRI revealed a vein of Galen malformation with hydrocephalus, and tonsillar prolapse
underwent successful acute ventriculocisternostomy for her hydrocephalus

patient_outcome.final_status: somewhat delayed psychomotor development with regard to motor milestones as well as speech and cognition, but can follow normal day-care activities
